name: Constructor University Bremen
description: Germany's most international private research university with over 80% international students and 100% English-taught programs. Offers a liberal arts and sciences foundation with strong STEM research focus.

name: IU International University of Applied Sciences
description: Germany's largest private university with over 100,000 students across multiple campuses and online. Offers flexible study modes (on-campus, online, dual) with a strong focus on applied technology and industry connections. State-accredited by the German Accreditation Council.

name: CODE University of Applied Sciences Berlin
description: Project-based, interdisciplinary university in Berlin's tech hub focusing on software engineering, product management, and interaction design. Strong startup culture with project-based learning from day one. Excellent connections to Berlin's booming tech ecosystem.

name: SRH Berlin University of Applied Sciences
name_german: SRH Berlin University of Applied Sciences
description: Part of the SRH University Network, one of Germany's largest private education groups. Offers intensive CORE learning model with strong industry partnerships in Berlin. Compact 3-semester Master's programs designed for efficiency.

name: SRH Hochschule Heidelberg
description: Located in the historic university city of Heidelberg, SRH Hochschule offers applied sciences programs with strong ties to the Baden-Württemberg tech and pharmaceutical industry. CORE learning model emphasizes competency-based education.

name: ESMT Berlin
name_german: European School of Management and Technology
programs: MSc in Data Analytics and Decision Sciences
description: Founded by 25 leading European companies, ESMT Berlin is a top-ranked business school focused on responsible leadership and innovation. Excellent for tech management, entrepreneurship, and data analytics career paths in the European tech ecosystem.

name: Frankfurt School of Finance and Management
programs: MSc in Blockchain and Digital Assets
description: Triple-accredited (AACSB, EQUIS, AMBA) business school in Europe's financial capital. The MSc in Applied Data Science is particularly strong for students wanting to combine programming skills with finance. Strong fintech and blockchain focus.

name: WHU Otto Beisheim School of Management
name_german: WHU – Otto Beisheim School of Management
description: Germany's top-ranked private business school, consistently ranking in the Financial Times top European business schools. Strong alumni network and recruiting pipeline to top consultancies and tech companies. Business analytics track suits engineering backgrounds.

name: Macromedia University of Applied Sciences
name_german: Macromedia Hochschule für Medien und Kommunikation
description: Specialized media and design university with campuses in Munich, Hamburg, Berlin, Cologne, Stuttgart, and Frankfurt. Strong focus on UX/UI design with connections to Germany's creative and tech industries. Good for CS grads transitioning into product/UX roles.

name: University of Europe for Applied Sciences
name_german: University of Europe for Applied Sciences
programs: MSc Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
description: Part of the Global University Systems network with campuses in Berlin, Hamburg, Potsdam, and Iserlohn. Strong focus on applied digital skills and industry-relevant education. The AI/Data Science program is growing rapidly with modern curriculum.

name: Berlin International University of Applied Sciences
name_german: Berlin International University of Applied Sciences
description: Small, internationally focused university in Berlin offering English-taught programs. Strong international student community and personalized learning environment. Located in Berlin's vibrant startup ecosystem.

name: BiTS Business and Information Technology School
name_german: BiTS – Business and Information Technology School
description: Business-IT hybrid school in Iserlohn (part of Global University Systems) offering programs at the intersection of technology and business management. Smaller class sizes and practical orientation.

name: New European College Munich
description: Boutique private university in Munich offering management programs with a European perspective. Very small class sizes (under 30 students) and strong mentorship. Located in Germany's economic powerhouse city.

name: Fresenius University of Applied Sciences
programs: MSc Digital Innovation and Business Transformation
description: One of Germany's oldest and largest private universities with campuses in Idstein, Cologne, Munich, Hamburg, Frankfurt, and Düsseldorf. Particularly strong in chemistry, biology, healthcare informatics, and digital media. Over 170 years of tradition.

name: ISM International School of Management
description: State-accredited private business school with campuses in Dortmund, Frankfurt, Munich, Hamburg, Cologne, and Stuttgart. Focus on international management with strong industry partnerships in the Ruhr region and beyond.

name: CBS International Business School
description: International-focused private business school in Cologne with strong connections to the Rhineland business community. Good for Indian students seeking management education with a digital focus.

name: GISMA Business School
description: Part of Global University Systems, GISMA Business School offers business and technology programs in Berlin and Hannover. Strong focus on analytics and business technology with flexible intake options.

name: Arden University Berlin
description: UK-based Arden University's Berlin campus offering British degrees with German location advantages. Good for students wanting a UK-accredited degree while living in Berlin's tech hub. Flexible blended learning options available.

name: Steinbeis University Berlin

other: Bachelor degree in engineering or related field

description: Unique transfer-oriented university where all programs are linked with real company projects. Students work on actual business problems from day one. Particularly strong for engineering graduates wanting to transition into management roles with deep technical grounding.

name: Touro College Berlin
description: American-style liberal arts university in Berlin, part of Touro University's global network (New York). Offers US-accredited degrees in Germany. Small class sizes and strong academic support. Good for students wanting American-style education in Europe.

name: EBS University for Business and Law
name_german: EBS Universität für Wirtschaft und Recht
description: Private university in the Rheingau region near Frankfurt. One of Germany's oldest private business universities with strong connections to the German financial sector. Business Analytics track is relevant for quantitative/technical backgrounds.

name: BSP Business School Berlin
name_german: BSP Business School Berlin – Hochschule für Management
description: Berlin-based management school with focus on digital business and innovation. Located in Charlottenburg, close to Berlin's startup and corporate tech scene. Strong practical orientation with project-based learning.

name: accadis Hochschule Bad Homburg
description: Boutique private university near Frankfurt known for international management and pharmaceutical management. Very small cohorts with strong mentorship and industry ties to Frankfurt's financial and pharma sectors.

name: Hamburg School of Business Administration
programs: MSc Logistics and Supply Chain Management
description: Founded by the Hamburg Chamber of Commerce, HSBA is Hamburg's leading private business school. Strong connections to Hamburg's port, logistics, and trade industries. The dual study model integrates industry from day one. Excellent for tech students interested in logistics tech.

name: Schiller International University
description: American-style private university with over 60 years in Europe. Multiple campuses across Europe (Heidelberg, Paris, Tampa, Madrid). Good for students wanting a multicultural American-curriculum experience in Germany.

name: Munich Business School
description: Munich's leading private business school with strong ties to Bavaria's automotive and tech industry. Programs emphasize international management with a digital transformation lens. Excellent career placement in Munich's premium employer market.

name: Wilhelm Büchner Hochschule
name_german: Wilhelm Büchner Hochschule – Private Hochschule Darmstadt
description: Distance-learning private university specializing in engineering and computer science. Programs can be completed entirely online with flexible scheduling. Ideal for working professionals. Very affordable tuition for a private university in Germany.

name: Hochschule der Wirtschaft für Management (HdWM)
name_german: Hochschule der Wirtschaft für Management Mannheim
description: Private management university in Mannheim's metropolitan region – home to some of Germany's biggest corporations. Strong industry partnerships in the Rhine-Neckar area. Focus on practical management education with digital transformation emphasis.

name: DIPLOMA Hochschule
description: Distributed private university with over 30 study centers across Germany offering flexible and affordable programs. Multiple campuses enable students to study close to home or choose major city locations. Strong in applied computer science and engineering.

name: Allensbach Hochschule
description: Affordable distance-learning private university on Lake Constance, near the Swiss border. Offers flexible online-based programs combining theory with practical applications. Ideal for working professionals looking to upskill.

name: Hochschule Döpfer
description: Specialized private university in Cologne focused on healthcare professions and health informatics. Particularly relevant for students with CS backgrounds interested in medical informatics and digital health applications in Germany.

name: Mediadesign Hochschule
name_german: Mediadesign Hochschule für Design und Informatik

other: Bachelor degree in design or IT

description: Specialized design and informatics university with campuses in Munich, Berlin, and Düsseldorf. Strong intersection of UX, digital design, and programming. Good for CS/engineering students with design interests.

name: Provadis School of International Management and Technology
description: Located in Frankfurt's Höchst industrial park, Provadis specializes in dual-study programs in partnership with chemical and pharmaceutical companies. Strong ties to Infraserv Höchst and the Frankfurt chemical industry cluster.

name: Cologne Business School
description: State-accredited private university in Cologne offering business programs with strong digital focus. Located in one of Germany's largest cities with excellent industry access. Good for engineering graduates wanting business education.

name: Quadriga Hochschule Berlin
description: Specialized in communications, PR, and leadership education with strong Berlin media network. Part-time and full-time options available. Relevant for tech students interested in tech communications or digital PR in Germany.

name: HTK Academy Hamburg
description: Design-focused private school in Hamburg specializing in interaction, fashion, and interior design. Relevant for CS students with strong design interests looking to enter UX/product design fields. Hamburg's creative industry connections.

name: AMD Akademie Mode und Design
description: Germany's leading fashion and design academy with campuses in Hamburg, Düsseldorf, Berlin, Munich, and Frankfurt. Part of the Global University Systems network. Strong fashion and creative industry connections.

name: IBS International Business School Hamburg
name_german: IBS – International Business School of Service Management
description: Specialized in service management and hospitality with strong ties to Hamburg's tourism and shipping industries. Offers hands-on learning with industry placements. Good for CS students wanting to enter tech-driven hospitality management.

name: Design Akademie Berlin
name_german: Design Akademie Berlin – SRH Hochschule für Kommunikation und Design
description: SRH-affiliated design school in Berlin focusing on communication design, UX/UI, and photography. Strong connections to Berlin's creative and tech startup ecosystem. Small cohorts with intensive studio-based learning.

name: Hochschule Fresenius (Cologne)
description: One of multiple Hochschule Fresenius campuses across Germany. Cologne campus has strong emphasis on digital media and data science. Well connected to Cologne's media and advertising industry cluster.
